hero.title: Buƙatar aikin samun dama
hero.lead: IATF tana nazarin buƙatun don ayyukan samun dama waɗanda suka fara daga ainihin buƙata.
support: Ba kwa buƙatar cikakken bayani dalla-dalla. Bayyana matsalar, wanda ya shafa, da kuma dalilin da ya sa yake da muhimmanci ya isa ya fara.

intro: Dukkan hanyoyi suna shiga cikin wannan bita.

items.label: Shafin yanar gizo
items.body: Yi amfani da fom ɗin da ke ƙasa don aika buƙata mai tsari.

items.label: Adireshin Imel
items.body: Aika da bukatar kai tsaye zuwa {{contact.requestsEmail}}Buƙatun imel na iya zama bayanan buƙatun jama'a bayan dubawa da gyarawa.

items.label: Rashin jituwa
items.body: Farawa a can idan hakan ya fi sauƙi. Buƙatar har yanzu tana motsawa cikin wannan bita.

guidance.title: Kafin ka aika da buƙata
paragraphs: Ana iya taƙaita buƙatun kuma a buga su azaman bayanan buƙatun jama'a a cikin ƙungiyar IATF GitHub, akan wannan rukunin yanar gizon, ko duka biyun.

Kada ku haɗa da adiresoshin sirri, lambobin waya, bayanan likita, ko bayanin ganowa game da masu amfani da mutum na fasahohin taimako sai dai idan ya zama dole kuma kuna da kwanciyar hankali tare da IATF duba shi.
IATF tana cire bayanan tuntuɓar mutum da ba dole ba kafin buga bayanan buƙatun.

review.title: Binciken abubuwan da ake tsammani
paragraphs: Bayar da buƙata ba ya tabbatar da karɓa.
IATF tana nazarin buƙatun don dacewa da manufa, yiwuwa, amfani, da kuma ko aikin ya kasance a cikin ma'ajiyar jama'a.
Wasu buƙatun za a iya ƙi, jinkirta, ko sake fasalin kafin karɓa.

fields.name: hanyar sadarwa
fields.label: Hanyar tuntuɓar da aka fi so
fields.helper: Ta yaya za a ci gaba?

fields.name: Ƙarin bayani
fields.label: Bayanan tuntuɓar
fields.helper: Adireshin imel ko lambar Discord don ci gaba.
fields.placeholder: Adireshin Imel ko sunan mai amfani na Discord

fields.name: harshe
fields.label: Harshe
fields.helper: Yaren da kuka fi so, idan ya dace.

fields.name: matsala
fields.label: Wace matsala ce kake ƙoƙarin warwarewa?
fields.helper: Bayyana shingen a cikin harshe mai sauƙi.

fields.name: extraAbubuwan da ke ciki
fields.label: Ƙarin mahallin
fields.helper: Raba duk wani abu da ke taimakawa bayyana buƙatar: dalilin da yasa yake da mahimmanci, misalai, nassoshi, ra'ayin software mara kyau, ko ƙuntataccen lokaci.

fields.name: openSourceConsent Ƙaddamarwa
fields.label: Kuna jin dadi da ci gaban bude tushen jama'a?
fields.helper: Ayyukan da aka karɓa sune wuraren ajiyar jama'a a ƙarƙashin IATF.

items: wani wurin ajiyar jama'a a cikin kungiyar IATF GitHub
Injiniyan da ke da alhakin aikin da aka sanya wa aikin
lasisin copyleft don lambar da kayan aikin
ci gaban jama'a a cikin rumbun adana bayanai
shigar da rajista a shafin IATF

header.title: Taƙaitacciyar, roƙo mai ma'ana ya isa ya fara

paragraphs: Idan kuna da ainihin buƙatar samun dama kuma kuna tunanin ya kamata ya zama aikin jama'a, aika mana da shi.
